.file-embed.background: rgb(20, 22, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-files-container .tree-item.background: rgba(211, 226, 255, 0.094) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-header.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(55, 59, 66), rgb(39, 43, 49) 50%, rgb(32, 35, 41) 50%, rgb(25, 28, 33)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(32, 35, 41) linear-gradient(rgb(47, 51, 58), rgb(39, 43, 49) 50%, rgb(32, 35, 41) 50%, rgb(20, 22, 26)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(8, 8, 9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(8, 8, 9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(0deg, rgb(29, 32, 37) 0%, rgb(8, 8, 8) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(0deg, rgb(29, 32, 37) 0%, rgb(8, 8, 8) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(0deg, rgb(29, 32, 37) 0%, rgb(8, 8, 8) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgba(63, 67, 75, 0.867), rgba(32, 35, 41, 0.867)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(0deg, rgb(29, 32, 37) 0%, rgb(8, 8, 8) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(29, 32, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(29, 32, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(20, 22, 26) 0%, rgb(25, 28, 33) 50%, rgb(32, 35, 41) 50%, rgb(39, 43, 49) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(39, 43, 49) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(20, 22, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(20, 22, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(20, 22, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
